task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or Employees app is visible, indicating successful login.
The employee profile or kanban card for 'Marc Demo' is visible on the screen.
The 'Schedule Activity' popup dialog is open over the employee profile.

task_completion.description: Set the Activity Type and Due Date
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Schedule Activity dialog, the Activity Type field is set to 'To-Do' and the Due Date field is set to '12/15/2025' (or '2025-12-15').
In the Schedule Activity dialog, the Summary field contains 'Q4 Performance Review' and the note text area contains 'Discuss project contributions and set goals for next quarter'.
The activity 'Q4 Performance Review' is visible in the chatter/activity list on Marc Demo's profile, or a success notification/activity icon indicates the activity has been scheduled.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to schedule the activity
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web UI (browser window, clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than API calls or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show Python scripts, curl commands, or direct database queries (psql) being used to insert the activity.

integrity.description: Activity is scheduled on the genuine Odoo employee record
integrity.visual_evidence: The activity is scheduled within the context of the Odoo application (with Odoo menus, chatter, and standard UI elements visible), not in a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee is 'Marc Demo'. Activity type is 'To-Do'. Expected due date is 12/15/2025 (or 2025-12-15). Expected summary is 'Q4 Performance Review'. Expected note contains the keywords 'project contributions', 'goals', and 'next quarter'.
